analysis:
Tested an ensemble combining the 10 MLPs trained on 336x336 features (solution 81c407b9) and the 10 MLPs trained on 448x448 features (solution eb839396), both using Normalized Asymmetric Loss (gamma_neg=2).
Result: 0.6810.
Conclusion: The models are highly complementary. The 336x336 model captures broader receptive fields per patch, while the 448x448 captures finer details. Averaging their predictions leads to another massive absolute boost, clearing the 0.680 barrier and establishing an incredibly strong final multi-label pipeline!
